ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* The actual date */,
  "iso_week_number" INTEGER /* ISO week number for the date */,
  "calendar_week_number" INTEGER /* Calendar week number for the date */,
  "iso_year_number" INTEGER /* ISO year number for the date */,
  "iso_week" TEXT /* Concatenated ISO week and year */,
  "iso_week_sequential" INTEGER /* Sequential count of days within the ISO week */,
  "iso_year_day_number" INTEGER /* Sequential count of days within the ISO year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the date entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the date entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the date of the transaction */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "start_date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the start date of the report period */,
  "end_date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the end date of the report period */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_start_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_end_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate to USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the audit log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the audit log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "accessed_by" TEXT /* User who accessed the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user-role association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction history entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
